channel.title: NPR Topics: Religion
channel.description: NPR's stories on U.S. and world religion, spirituality, ethics, and moral issues affecting society and culture. Subscribe to NPR Religion RSS feeds.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Pope Leo calls for peace and an end to world conflicts in first Easter Mass
item.description: Pope Leo delivered his first Easter Mass as pope with a call for world leaders to choose peace over war.
item.content:encoded: Pope Leo delivered his first Easter Mass as pope with a call for world leaders to choose peace over war.
item.dc:creator: Ruth Sherlock

item.title: Former Vatican correspondent discusses Pope Leo's Easter message of peace
item.description: NPR's Leila Fadel speaks with former Vatican correspondent and Georgetown scholar Christopher White about Pope Leo's Easter peace message.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Leila Fadel speaks with former Vatican correspondent and Georgetown scholar Christopher White about Pope Leo's Easter peace message.
item.dc:creator: Leila Fadel

item.title: Pope Leo appeals for peace in Easter address
item.description: Pope Leo XIV celebrated his first Easter as pope on Sunday in Rome, and he called for world leaders involved in global conflicts to lay down their arms.
item.content:encoded: Pope Leo XIV celebrated his first Easter as pope on Sunday in Rome, and he called for world leaders involved in global conflicts to lay down their arms.
item.dc:creator: Claire Giangrave

item.title: The tradition of Easter treats known as 'lamb cakes'
item.description: For many people, Easter is about church, easter egg hunts, and cakes baked in the shape of a lamb. It's not clear exactly when the tradition started, but in Central Europe there are lamb-shaped pans that date back centuries.
item.content:encoded: For many people, Easter is about church, easter egg hunts, and cakes baked in the shape of a lamb. It's not clear exactly when the tradition started, but in Central Europe there are lamb-shaped pans that date back centuries.
item.dc:creator: Deena Prichep

item.title: Buttercream wool and jelly bean eyes: The art of the Easter lamb cake
item.description: The cakes – usually baked in the shape of a lamb using a special pan – have a long history in Central Europe, from the German osterlamm, to the Polish baranek wielkanocny, to the Alsatian lammele.
item.content:encoded:
The cakes – usually baked in the shape of a lamb using a special pan – have a long history in Central Europe, from the German osterlamm, to the Polish baranek wielkanocny, to the Alsatian lammele.

(Image credit: Charra Jarosz)
item.dc:creator: Deena Prichep

item.title: Pope Leo XIV revives Holy Week practices
item.description: As Pope Leo approaches the anniversary of his election as Pope, we look at the biggest moments of his first year, and how he plans to celebrate Easter in Rome.
item.content:encoded: As Pope Leo approaches the anniversary of his election as Pope, we look at the biggest moments of his first year, and how he plans to celebrate Easter in Rome.
item.dc:creator: Claire Giangrave

item.title: Seville, Spain's Holy Week blends faith, tradition and spectacle
item.description: Even as religious belief declines in Spain, the processions at Seville's Semana Santa — the Holy Week lead-up to Easter — draw crowds moved by music, tradition and powerful emotion.
item.content:encoded:
Even as religious belief declines in Spain, the processions at Seville's Semana Santa — the Holy Week lead-up to Easter — draw crowds moved by music, tradition and powerful emotion.

(Image credit: Fran Santiago)
item.dc:creator: Alexis Marshall

item.title: Christian therapists and LGBTQ people of faith respond to Supreme Court ruling
item.description: The Supreme Court's decision outlawing bans on conversion therapy will change the legal situation in many states. An evangelical Christian therapist and LGBTQ activist share how people are responding.
item.content:encoded: The Supreme Court's decision outlawing bans on conversion therapy will change the legal situation in many states. An evangelical Christian therapist and LGBTQ activist share how people are responding.
item.dc:creator: Jason DeRose

item.title: Israeli police stop Latin Patriarch from entering Palm Sunday Mass at Holy Sepulchre
item.description: Israeli police stopped the Latin Patriarch in Jerusalem from celebrating Palm Sunday Mass at the Church of the Holy Sepulcher, citing war safety regulations.
item.content:encoded: Israeli police stopped the Latin Patriarch in Jerusalem from celebrating Palm Sunday Mass at the Church of the Holy Sepulcher, citing war safety regulations.
item.dc:creator: Carrie Kahn

item.title: Pope Leo XIV rejects claims that God justifies war in Palm Sunday Mass message
item.description: Pope Leo XIV rejected claims that God justifies war and prayed especially for Christians in the Middle East during a Palm Sunday Mass before tens of thousands of people in St. Peter's Square.
item.content:encoded:
Pope Leo XIV rejected claims that God justifies war and prayed especially for Christians in the Middle East during a Palm Sunday Mass before tens of thousands of people in St. Peter's Square.

(Image credit: Remo Casilli)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
